title: Junior Business Development Manager at Sunteck Realty

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Sunteck Realty
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Sunteck Realty. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Business Development Manager to strengthen our Ghaziabad-based team.

About Sunteck Realty:
Sunteck Realty is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sunteck Realty!
